user_reviews: [{"Name":"J Seng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP7OUCnLw68yrAPXNbrudd7mhfivsgqRFt8QQVrGjO-apmao_Lcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Consistent coffee taste, just like any other Starbucks outlets.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"vaalle vaalle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTV_5vShp54WredJ214Og5Rn_Il0cOx6UpEaKBUQmh9uiH-AY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Стабильность и качество данной сети не вызывает никаких сомнений. Быстрое обслуживание и качественный сервис. Находятся между подземным выходом из метро  и входом в главный зал.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDF3ufZkQE\u0026fid=0x0:0xdd9f923a55b68116"],"When":"2023-11-7"},{"Name":"TZ Cheng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVU_QDAkV0RVZlpwcxJ9KkLRAdE-X0RSFAuBPRIVm3zrlswMAkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"北京南站的星巴克，几乎每次去南站坐高铁都去买点吃的带上，有一多半的机会要排大队。相比于星巴克，其它卖饮料零食的商店就没有这么多顾客了，真是不明白国内那是品牌有个现成的榜样，为什么就学不起来？总结一下，凡是有星巴克的高铁站，就算档次高了一格。\n现在北京南站南面北面都各有一间星巴克店，北面店面不大，但是不远处有些公共座椅，可以坐在那里吃喝，也还算方便。就是入口在Costa coffee傍边的小门，再上二层，估计很多客人都注意不到。北京不仅打个车，现在买个喝的都得扫个健康宝二维码，所有行踪都记录在案。\n北京南站在西平台开了个口子，让商务座客人单独过安检，人比较少，所以多花钱可以获得更大社交距离，看来没钱是万万不能的。也可见铁老大开始“屈膝”讨好他的客户，世道正因为小小冠状病毒彻底地改变着。","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Beech","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRw0JrdtDEUIBPAJE7Yo38ygFKU6GKFhFwiI7ry4vJzXO9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Crumpled Nomad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_8WKZUyCr2E4x3sGfq5Y-NR9g7NIgn0I1iVa7poPYM3-o3mIyBA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"While we enjoyed breakfast at Starbucks Reserve (Beijingfang) and appreciated the quiet, uncrowded atmosphere in the morning, one aspect stood out in a less positive way — the service. Yes, the staff were polite, they smiled, and everything was done according to procedure, but the interaction felt formulaic and lacking genuine warmth.

Starbucks has always branded itself on personalised service and human connection, yet that signature warmth felt missing here. The smiles felt rehearsed rather than sincere, and there was little sense of engagement beyond basic transactional interaction. Unfortunately, this isn’t an isolated experience. Having visited Starbucks outlets in multiple cities across China, I’ve noticed a similar pattern — consistent service standards, but often emotionally distant and somewhat “scripted.”

This is particularly concerning given how competitive the coffee market is in China today, with strong local brands offering not just good coffee but also friendlier, more authentic service experiences. While the coffee quality remains reliable, Starbucks may need to pay closer attention to service culture if it wants to maintain its edge in such a dynamic market.

In short: good coffee and environment, but the service feels polite without soul — something Starbucks should seriously reflect on in China.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKsVnt9DA6OgnCZMOl_x3P&fid=0x0:0x72daf361238d08b7"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Diana Zdanovich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIv-v36ucnvAzjUgt-Q4T6T1Wa6Wta7r9njXRqp4wSnRP61A8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The coffee here is the best!
This Starbucks Reserve is a very stylish and aesthetic café with a wide selection of souvenirs and products. The place is always super clean and well-kept.
The real gem is the staff: the baristas speak English and are very kind, friendly, and welcoming. During my stay, I stopped by almost every day for an almond latte.
The location is also great — right next to a beautiful spot with lanterns and benches, where it’s lovely to sit in the café and enjoy the view of the red lights.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsfM0gWFmctnEjD8XlTeo-&fid=0x0:0x72daf361238d08b7"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Samuel Lam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZvC3XKUL098VRbgpMEGeV5vUh7e8AAXbx3_-u8pdkGuvSrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A nice Starbucks experience!!!!!

Do stop and enjoy the limited coffee selections with a good cake or a warm croissant!

Nothing special.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ZH Peter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLW5JeXWRpFjy3kC9Xa8UFWpkp5p8CZpO8K7_q6cGdzgpIN4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"星巴克来自美国，71年成立的，可以说是全球最大的咖啡连锁店了，当然人家的咖啡也是非常有名的，特别是手工制作的浓缩咖啡更是不错！ 早些时候咖啡☕感觉还是离我们很远的东西，像种奢侈品，现在已经慢慢的融入了我们的生活，星巴克更是首当其冲……","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"li zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMSBk5_y95BiW_SGimaVSwxeY2m6vUNq1fujN1T3FgHa1owQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"传闻北京最早的星巴克店，当然还是翻新了下，据说原来第一家店在上面后来新店建在下面了，既然路过当然不能错过纯说中的氮气咖啡——气致冷翠，貌似只有这家店有，超大的冷翠氮气机器藏匿于吧台之下，丝滑口感好似浓醇的牛奶浮于表面，曼妙滋味唯有体验才能感受，不过气体很快就会挥发，就像卡布的奶泡一样，虽然可以外带，但相信如果不当场迅速饮用，口感将大打折扣，这算是星爸爸里面咖啡饮含量最高的一款饮品水和咖啡比例将近1:1在下午2点多饮用夜晚依然亢奋，感觉夏季早餐后，工作前10前饮用最佳，估计这款普及到西边还是有些难度，和需要些时间，席间还见外省星伙伴不要万里来此店试喝体验，祝他心脏还好～","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"スタバカ（SUTABAKA）","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTLxe8-oIJCozHCmO296_ESRZAnIpw8r8e3-GbE92pYKYMTFRQBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"規模は小さいですが、こういうお店の方が中国では落ち着きます。","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dante Zhao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5mOr4I8-6LxR4SaQRy-wWfdCHsT1Bg-ZP0xQ1JOT1qSZVrxeX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"星巴克的人员流动性太强了","Images":null,"When":""}]
